narrowed.from: Classes (Record<string, string>) — inherited from StandardProps via JssProps
narrowed.reason: Tailwind-routing shim (withClasses) replaces MUI v4 JSS classes. Slot keys narrowed to the canonical Button slots per migration plan v4 §2.3 strict-preservation policy.
narrowed.consumer-impact: Consumers passing `classes` with keys other than 'root' | 'label' | 'icon' will now fail TS compilation. Runtime: extra keys are silently ignored by withClasses. Values are now Tailwind class strings instead of generated MUI class names; consumers relying on .MuiButton-root selectors or '&$disabled' nested-state selectors need codemods (handled separately in PF-1995).
